settings.short_description: Tracks sleep, heart rate, HRV, SpO₂ and recovery. Continuously. No subscription.
settings.accordion_whats-included:
1× N°…01 Smart Band (your chosen colour)
1× USB-C magnetic charging cable
1× Quick start guide
settings.accordion_how-it-works:
1. Wear it. Slide the ring onto your index or middle finger. The sensors face inward.
2. Charge weekly. A full charge takes 60–90 minutes and lasts up to 7 days.
3. Open the QRing app. Download free on iOS or Android. Sync, and your overnight data appears instantly.
4. Read your scores. Sleep quality, HRV, resting heart rate, SpO₂ and daily recovery — all in one view.
settings.accordion_ingredients-certifications:
Materials
Glossy ceramic shell · Polished chrome inner band

Sensors
PPG (photoplethysmography) · Accelerometer · Skin temperature · SpO₂

Connectivity
Bluetooth 5.0

Waterproof rating
IP68 — 100 m / 328 ft

Compatibility
iOS 14+ · Android 8+

Subscription
None. The app is free. Forever.

settings.text: 7-day battery — never miss a night of data
Jewelry-grade ceramic — looks like a ring, not a gadget

settings.heading: Everything your watch can’t tell you.
settings.body: Your smartwatch counts steps and celebrates effort. The N°…01 Smart Band tracks the metric that actually matters — how recovered you are. HRV, sleep architecture, overnight temperature. The numbers that decide whether tomorrow builds you up or breaks you down.

settings.text: Sleep stages — deep, light, REM + sleep score
Heart rate variability (HRV) — true recovery signal
Skin temperature — catches illness and cycle shifts early
Stress & recovery score — know when to push, when to rest
Steps, calories, active minutes — automatic workout detection

settings.heading: One ring. Everything that matters.
settings.body: Your body is always communicating. Most trackers catch one or two signals. The N°…01 reads six — day and night, automatically, without you touching a thing.

settings.quote: I’ve been telling my doctor something was wrong for two years. I brought in my HRV and temperature charts and she finally listened. First thing that’s ever given me proof.
settings.author: Sarah M.

settings.quote: Been lifting for 4 years. This showed me I was recovered enough to train hard exactly 11 times in 2 months. Stopped overtraining, finally broke a plateau.
settings.author: Keelan R.

settings.quote: I’ve rejected every smartwatch my wife has bought me. This is different — it looks like a ring because it is one. Nobody at work even knows what it is.
settings.author: David H.
